creator: freebsd@spatula.net
text:
This is a port of "speak" which generates random management synergybabble,
which was apparently coded by Ken Marx from source originally by Dave
Buxbaum.
The source is a modified version that looks for a default data path if 
the SPEAKPATH environment variable is not set, and with a cleaner makefile.

shar archive below

How-To-Repeat: n/a
